powers.name: Attack
powers.description: The Bird pokes its head forward opening its beak making a screech.
powers.effect: Base damage 3, crit threshold 6, Long range.

powers.name: Defend
powers.description: The Bird spreads its wings, shielding the Explorer it defends.
powers.effect: Used as a reaction to protect an Explorer from an attack, like a block or dodge.

powers.name: Clear Blight
powers.description: The Bird spreads its wings wide horizontally in front of it as if covering an area protectively.
powers.effect: Clears all Blight from one zone for one shift. Duration increased by one shift per extra ✦.

powers.name: Blight Scan
powers.description: Upon returning, the Bird pokes at the scanner and Garuda device with its beak.
powers.effect: The Bird flies ahead (up to four zones) and scans for Blight to be read by the Garuda device.

powers.name: Soak Blight
powers.description: The Bird starts to glow in lightning blue and turquoise colors as fractures spread across its body as it soaks and contains the Blight.
powers.effect: Used as a reaction to absorb all the Blight from a Blight surge before it can affect any Explorer.

powers.name: Glow
powers.description: The Bird's body starts to glow in bright yellow-white light.
powers.effect: Emits a glowing light providing illumination for one shift in the Bird's zone and all adjacent zones (Medium range).

powers.name: Raptor's Call
powers.description: The Bird screeches with a short high sound, directing a semi-visible fluctuation in the air coinciding with the Explorer's attack.
powers.effect: One attack performed by an Explorer later in the round inflicts an automatic critical injury if it hits, regardless of cover and armor.

powers.name: Energy Bridge
powers.description: A beam of dark energy of the Bird's primary color emanates from its open beak.
powers.effect: Projects a bridge of solid energy up to 5 meters, carrying up to 200 kg. Each extra ✦ extends by 5m or adds 200 kg. Lasts one stretch.

powers.name: Farsight
powers.description: The Bird stretches its head straight up, glowing faintly before it takes flight.
powers.effect: The Bird's companion can see what the Bird sees, up to a distance in zones equal to twice the number of ✦ rolled.

powers.name: Illusionary Veil
powers.description: The Bird sits perfectly still on the Explorer, becoming blurry as the power takes effect.
powers.effect: Hides one Explorer from sight, even from scanners. Each extra ✦ hides one more Explorer in the zone. Lasts one stretch.

powers.name: Enshroud
powers.description: The Bird crosses its wings as it activates the field, glowing for a second in the Bird's primary color as it enshrouds the Explorer.
powers.effect: Envelops an Explorer in a protective field, fully protecting them from the Blight for one stretch. Can be used as a reaction against a Blight attack.

powers.name: Soul Delve
powers.description: The Bird glows in a warm orange, illuminating the Explorer it merges with.
powers.effect: The Bird merges with an Explorer's mind, giving them rest and rekindling their hope. The Explorer regains all lost Hope, even if broken by despair.

powers.name: Fetch
powers.description: The Bird spreads its wings wide before landing.
powers.effect: The Bird flies away and fetches a clearly visible regular object at up to Extreme range.

powers.name: Dimensional Flitting
powers.description: The Bird points its wings upwards and small seemingly electrical discharges spread from the wingtips creating a spherical rift.
powers.effect: Opens a portal to a location where the Bird has been in the past day. Max distance in zones equals twice the ✦ rolled. Portal lasts one round; any object human-sized or smaller can pass through.

powers.name: Flicker Field
powers.description: The Bird's chest swells as the field of its primary color creates a shield in front of the Explorers.
powers.effect: Fully protects one Explorer against all incoming ranged attacks until end of round. Each extra ✦ protects one more Explorer in the zone.

powers.name: Glyph Warden
powers.description: The Glyph in question dims or becomes blurry for a moment as the Bird blocks its effect.
powers.effect: As a reaction, blocks the effect of a Glyph affecting an Explorer. Each extra ✦ protects one more Explorer in the zone.

powers.name: Phoenix Engine
powers.description: Bright flames briefly enshroud the Bird. When the flames disappear the Bird is left covered with white ash that falls to the ground.
powers.effect: If broken or dead (killed within the last shift), the Bird comes back to life and regains all its Health. Exception: can be used when the Bird is broken.

powers.name: Delve Dream
powers.description: The Bird's chest seems to glow yellow white as it imbues the vision to the Explorer.
powers.effect: Sends a dreamlike vision about the current delve. The Explorers can delve three zones before triggering an event, regardless of the delving roll result.
